title: Page Render Utilities Flow
interaction_flow: BuildSubPages → parseFrontmatter: parseFrontmatter(rawMarkdownContent) — parses YAML frontmatter + body from .md files

parseFrontmatter → parseFrontmatter: regex match /^---
([\s\S]*?)
---
([\s\S]*)$/, split lines, parse key-value pairs and arrays
parseFrontmatter → BuildSubPages: return { frontmatter: object, body: string }
BuildSubPages → renderPage: renderPage({ title, description, bodyHtml, activeNav, canonicalPath, extraHead?, bodyClass?, assetDepth? })
renderPage → readHeaderPartial: readHeaderPartial()
readHeaderPartial → readHeaderPartial: check cachedHeader !== null (cache guard)
readHeaderPartial → fs: fs.readFileSync(HEADER_PARTIAL, 'utf8').trim()  [only on first call]
fs → readHeaderPartial: return raw HTML string
readHeaderPartial → renderPage: return cachedHeader (string)
renderPage → applyActiveNav: applyActiveNav(headerHtml, activeNav)
applyActiveNav → applyActiveNav: if !activeNav return headerHtml unchanged
applyActiveNav → applyActiveNav: regex replace data-nav="{activeNav}" → add aria-current="page"
applyActiveNav → renderPage: return modified headerHtml
renderPage → escapeHtml: escapeHtml(title) — escape &, <, >, ", '
renderPage → escapeAttr: escapeAttr(description) — escape " only
renderPage → renderPage: build canonical <link> tag if canonicalPath provided
renderPage → renderPage: compute rel prefix (e.g. '../' × assetDepth)
renderPage → BuildSubPages: return full <!DOCTYPE html> string
BuildSubPages → fs: fs.writeFileSync(outPath, html, 'utf-8')
fs → FileSystem: write HTML file to public/skills/*.html, public/anti-patterns/*.html, public/tutorials/*.html
key_relationships: BuildSubPages imports parseFrontmatter from utils.js (via sub-pages-data.js)
renderPage internally calls readHeaderPartial() then applyActiveNav()
readHeaderPartial uses module-level cachedHeader variable (singleton cache)
writeFile (utils.js) wraps fs.writeFileSync with ensureDir auto-creation; BuildSubPages also calls fs.writeFileSync directly
parseFrontmatter is used by readSourceFiles (utils.js) and sub-pages-data.js for skill .md ingestion

function_signatures.readHeaderPartial: () => string  — reads content/site/partials/header.html, cached after first call
function_signatures.applyActiveNav: (headerHtml: string, activeNav: string) => string  — activeNav values: home|skills|anti-patterns|tutorials|gallery|github|docs
function_signatures.renderPage: ({ title, description, bodyHtml, activeNav?, canonicalPath?, extraHead?, bodyClass?, assetDepth? }) => string
function_signatures.writeFile: (filePath: string, content: string) => void  — calls ensureDir then fs.writeFileSync

important_notes: cachedHeader is module-level null; populated on first readHeaderPartial() call — shared across all renderPage() invocations in same process
renderPage embeds inline <script> for copy buttons, mobile sidebar toggle, and before/after split-compare drag interaction
assetDepth controls relative path prefix for Bun's HTML loader (default 1 = '../'); assets: favicon.svg, css/sub-pages.css
BuildSubPages calls fs.writeFileSync directly (not writeFile util); writeFile util is used by transformers/shared.js and transformers/factory.js
parseFrontmatter supports: scalar key-value, YAML-quoted strings, booleans, flat arrays, and arrays of objects (name + extra props)
Output directories: public/skills/, public/anti-patterns/, public/tutorials/ — wiped and recreated each build run
